heading: Alabama coal lands; agricultural entry
label: 77 Alabama coal lands; agricultural entry
text: Unreserved public lands containing coal deposits in the State of Alabama which on , were being withheld from homestead entry under the provisions of , may be entered under the homestead laws of the United States subject to the provisions, terms, conditions, and limitations prescribed in sections 83 to 85 of this title.April 23, 1912section 171 of this title
